Class GL_GLFWWindowSurface

java.lang.Object
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.graphics.impl.surface.AbstractGLFWWindowSurface
net.fokinatorr.sparkle.graphics.impl.gl.surface.GL_GLFWWindowSurface
All Implemented Interfaces:
AutoCloseable, RenderingSurface, WindowSurface, NonThrowingAutoCloseable
public final class GL_GLFWWindowSurface extends AbstractGLFWWindowSurface
A GLFW window rendering surface, providing GL framebuffers.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from interface RenderingSurface

    RenderingSurface.Feature, RenderingSurface.ResizeListener

  • Field Summary

    Fields inherited from interface RenderingSurface

    FB_ORIGINAL_SIZE

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Framebuffer
    acquireBuffer(int prefWidth, int prefHeight)
    Acquires the next available framebuffer for rendering, if any.

    Creates a new non-fullscreen window.

    Creates a new fullscreen window.

    Presents the given frame buffer onto this surface and releases it.

  • Method Details

    • create

      public static GL_GLFWWindowSurface create(String title, boolean translucent, EventDispatcher dispatcher, Stage stage, Thread graphicsThread)
      Creates a new non-fullscreen window.
      Parameters:
      title - the window title
      translucent - whether the window must be translucent
      dispatcher - the event dispatcher to use for sending window events
      stage - the stage to use for sending window events
      graphicsThread - the thread on which all calls must be made
      Returns:
      a new window surface

    • createFullscreen

      public static GL_GLFWWindowSurface createFullscreen(String title, long monitor, boolean translucent, EventDispatcher dispatcher, Stage stage, Thread graphicsThread)
      Creates a new fullscreen window.
      Parameters:
      title - the window title
      monitor - the GLFW monitor on which the window should be fullscreen
      translucent - whether the window must be translucent
      dispatcher - the event dispatcher to use for sending window events
      stage - the stage to use for sending window events
      graphicsThread - the thread on which all calls must be made
      Returns:
      a new window surface

    • acquireBuffer

      public Framebuffer acquireBuffer(int prefWidth, int prefHeight)
      Description copied from interface: RenderingSurface
      Acquires the next available framebuffer for rendering, if any.

      This method is for internal use only; see this note for details.

      Parameters:
      prefWidth - preferred framebuffer width or RenderingSurface.FB_ORIGINAL_SIZE
      prefHeight - preferred framebuffer height or RenderingSurface.FB_ORIGINAL_SIZE
      Returns:
      an available render target or null if not available

    • present

      public void present(Framebuffer frameBuffer)
      Description copied from interface: RenderingSurface
      Presents the given frame buffer onto this surface and releases it.

      This method is for internal use only; see this note for details.

      Parameters:
      frameBuffer - the frame buffer
